---
title: "Publications"
description-meta: "Papers, preprints, and reproducible research artifacts."
---

::: {.hero-subpage}
A record in progress — papers, preprints, and the reproducible artifacts behind each one.
:::

## In preparation

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Hackman, E.** *Physics-Informed Neural Networks for 3D Incompressible
Navier–Stokes with Applications to Cerebrospinal Fluid Flow.* (2026)
*— in preparation.*
:::

## Software & artifacts

**PINN-NS Research Workspace** (2026). Open-source dissertation workspace —
modular PINN solvers, classical numerical baselines, manufactured solutions, and
fully reproducible experiment configs for 3D Navier–Stokes.
[\[CITATION\]](#) · [\[GitHub\]](#)

## Coming soon

The first **completed experiment entry** (EXP-2026-001 — Method of Manufactured
Solutions smoke test) is expected mid-2026 and will be archived here with figures,
configs, and the underlying `manifest.json`.

A workshop paper draft from the **3D Beltrami benchmark** (EXP-2026-002 vs the
projection-method baseline) is targeted for the second half of 2026.

---

## Talks

*To be added.*

## Posters

*To be added.*

---

::: {.callout-tip appearance="minimal"}
For pre-prints and code, see my [GitHub](https://github.com/Hachero98) or
[email me](mailto:emmanuelhackman825@gmail.com).
:::
